# Ogma Annotations - AI Reference Documentation

> Documentation for @linkurious/ogma-annotations - a plugin for adding interactive annotations to Ogma graph visualizations.

## Available Documentation

- [TypeScript Reference](https://linkurious.github.io/ogma-annotations-control/AI_REFERENCE_TYPESCRIPT.md): Core TypeScript API, usage patterns, and examples
- [React Reference](https://linkurious.github.io/ogma-annotations-control/AI_REFERENCE_REACT.md): React integration with hooks and context provider
- [API Reference](https://linkurious.github.io/ogma-annotations-control/AI_REFERENCE_API.md): Complete API reference (interfaces, types, functions)

## Quick Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/Linkurious/ogma-annotations-control
- Documentation: https://linkurious.github.io/ogma-annotations-control/
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@linkurious/ogma-annotations

## Package Info

- Package: @linkurious/ogma-annotations
- React Package: @linkurious/ogma-annotations-react
- License: Apache-2.0
- Requires: Ogma >=4.5.6 or ^5.0.0
